name: homepage_0_home

facts.note: "Join the Zen Journey" email signup is visible near the footer.
The signup asks for updates and offers but does not show a discount or other first-order incentive.
A testimonial quote block is visible mid-page.
CTAs include "Shop Organic Sleep Tea" and "Discover Your Ritual."
Homepage copy includes the veteran-owned and family-operated brand story.

observed_strengths.observation: Homepage pairs use-case-led tea CTAs with a visible testimonial block.
A branded email capture exists on the homepage rather than only on policy pages.

missing_or_weak.observation: Homepage email capture is present but not incentivized.
Homepage metadata is weak: the OG title is the generic "Home Page."

purchase_path_notes: Homepage offers direct product CTAs and a footer email signup, but no incentive is attached to the capture.
